name: make_diff_pair_ports
full_help:
make_diff_pair_ports

Description: 
Make differential pair for 2 ports

Syntax: 
make_diff_pair_ports  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ports>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ports>     Ports to join

Categories: 
XDC, PinPlanning

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
